# Shared CSS (FOCSS)

## Why this folder exists

Single design system for site + planner. Tokens and bundles avoid hardcoded colors in TSX.

## What is here

- base/ — animations, resets
- core/tokens/ — @theme source of truth
- core/site/ — marketing bundles
- core/planner/ — workspace chrome, side panels, and bundles

## See also

- `docs/CSS-ARCHITECTURE.md`
